calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Peter Busch; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Sophia Apartments, LP is present. Represented by Jay Liederman.
Attorney David Stern appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Paulo Calle and Reginald Sylvester II are present.
Attorney Paulin Farmer-Koppenol representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 28, 2013 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
